title: The Exegesis on the Soul
description: The soul falls from heaven into prostitution in the material world, repents, and is restored to her divine bridegroom.
introduction: The soul falls from heaven into prostitution in the material world, repents, and is restored to her divine bridegroom.

translation.text: As long as she was alone with the Father, she was virgin. But when she fell into the body, she fell into the hands of many robbers.
